title: poa lapponica subsp. pilipes
intro: Poa lapponica subsp. pilipes, also known as Finnish meadow-grass, is a subspecies of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa lapponica subsp. pilipes include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can be used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu.
